# Go Best Practices (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for best-practices directory.

## Module Index

- [Best Practices Overview](./index.mdx): Overview of Go best practices with learning paths and skill level navigation.

## Code Style

- [Code Style Conventions](./code-style.mdx): Go code style conventions including gofmt, goimports, naming conventions, comment standards, code organization, common pitfalls, tools and setup, and code review checklist.

## Error Patterns

- [Error Handling Patterns](./error-patterns.mdx): Go error handling best practices including error wrapping, sentinel errors, error chains, custom errors, error handling patterns, layered error handling, common pitfalls, and code review checklist.

## Concurrency Patterns

- [Concurrency Patterns](./concurrency-patterns.mdx): Go concurrency patterns including worker pool patterns, fan-in/fan-out, pipeline patterns, semaphore patterns, context cancellation patterns, performance optimization, and code review checklist.

## Testing Strategies

- [Testing Strategies](./testing-strategies.mdx): Go testing strategies including table-driven tests, mocks, benchmarks, fuzzing, test coverage, test architecture, tools, and code review checklist.

## Anti-Patterns

- [Common Anti-Patterns](./anti-patterns.mdx): Common Go anti-patterns to avoid including performance, concurrency, memory, and design anti-patterns, detection methods, and code review checklist.
